text: N2005_MDCTN_INTRVTN_IND N2005_MDCTN_INTRVTN_IND N2005 Medication Intervention - The data in this column indicates whether the facility contacted and completed the physician (or physician-designee) prescribed/recommended actions by midnight of the next calendar day each time potential clinically significant medication issues were identified since the admission.
